title: Cavril: Wayfarer
description: Passive hexcrawl biome awareness and wilderness-travel bookkeeping. Reads the named hex tile under the active player token to show the current biome, its travel DC and movement restriction; tracks party rations, waterskins and hit-dice; rolls daily weather and surfaces its effects. Softly integrates with Augur: Nexus (enter a Site's linked scene straight from the hexmap). Built around The Augur's Primus hex-tile naming (Hex_Forest, Hex_Hills_Snowy, Hex_Damp, ...).
